ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_2" TEXT /* ISO 2-letter code for the country */,
  "iso_3" TEXT /* ISO 3-letter code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "phone_code" TEXT /* International phone code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of tax data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tax year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tax year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corporate_taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax year */,
  "corporate_rate" REAL /* Corporate tax rate */,
  "loss_carryback" REAL /* Maximum loss carryback period (in years) */,
  "loss_carryforward" REAL /* Maximum loss carryforward period (in years) */,
  "machines_cost_recovery" REAL /* Cost recovery for machines (rate) */,
  "buildings_cost_recovery" REAL /* Cost recovery for buildings (rate) */,
  "intangibles_cost_recovery" REAL /* Cost recovery for intangible assets (rate) */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Inventory accounting method */,
  "allowance_corporate_equity" REAL /* Allowance for corporate equity tax */,
  "patent_box" REAL /* Patent box regime (indicates if present) */,
  "r_and_d_credit" REAL /* R&D tax credit rate */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of corporate tax (e.g., income tax, profit tax) */,
  "tax_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for corporate tax applicability */,
  "tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Description of any tax exemptions */,
  "tax_deductions" TEXT /* Description of any tax deductions */,
  "tax_filing_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for filing corporate taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_taxes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES tax_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corporate_taxes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax incentive */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corporate tax record */,
  "digital_services_tax" REAL /* Rate of digital services tax */,
  "corporate_alt_minimum" REAL /* Corporate alternative minimum tax rate */,
  "corporate_surtax" REAL /* Corporate surtax rate */,
  "incentive_type" TEXT /* Type of tax incentive (e.g., R&D, digital services) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Description of eligibility criteria for the incentive */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Description of the application process */,
  "incentive_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the incentive (in years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_incentives_tax_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_id") REFERENCES corporate_taxes ("tax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_taxes" (
  "personal_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personal tax record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "top_income_rate" REAL /* Top marginal income tax rate */,
  "threshold_top_income_rate" REAL /* Income threshold for top rate */,
  "tax_wedge" REAL /* Total tax wedge (as a percentage) */,
  "personal_surtax" REAL /* Rate of personal surtax */,
  "personal_other_rev" REAL /* Other personal tax revenues */,
  "tax_brackets" TEXT /* Description of tax brackets (e.g., 0-50k, 50k-100k) */,
  "tax_deductions" TEXT /* Description of any tax deductions */,
  "tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Description of any tax exemptions */,
  "tax_filing_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for filing personal taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personal_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_taxes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gains_taxes" (
  "capital_gains_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital gains tax record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "capital_gains_rate" REAL /* Capital gains tax rate */,
  "index_capital_gains" REAL /* Indexation for capital gains */,
  "dividends_rate" REAL /* Rate of dividend tax */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* Value added tax rate */,
  "vat_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for VAT applicability */,
  "gains_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for capital gains tax applicability */,
  "long_term_rate" REAL /* Long-term capital gains tax rate */,
  "short_term_rate" REAL /* Short-term capital gains tax rate */,
  "indexation_method" TEXT /* Method of indexation for capital gains */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_gains_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_gains_taxes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_taxes" (
  "property_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property tax record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "property_tax" REAL /* Property tax rate */,
  "property_tax_collections" REAL /* Collections from property tax */,
  "net_wealth" REAL /* Net wealth tax rate */,
  "estate_or_inheritance_tax" REAL /* Estate or inheritance tax rate */,
  "transfer_tax" REAL /* Transfer tax rate */,
  "property_types" TEXT /* Types of properties subject to tax (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "tax_assessment_method" TEXT /* Method of assessing property tax */,
  "tax_exemptions" TEXT /* Description of any tax exemptions */,
  "tax_filing_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for filing property taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_taxes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withholding_taxes" (
  "withholding_tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for withholding tax records */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "dividends_withholding_tax" REAL /* Dividends withholding tax rate */,
  "interest_withholding_tax" REAL /* Interest withholding tax rate */,
  "royalties_withholding_tax" REAL /* Royalties withholding tax rate */,
  "tax_types" TEXT /* Types of income subject to withholding tax (e.g., dividends, interest) */,
  "thresholds" TEXT /* Thresholds for withholding tax applicability */,
  "exemptions" TEXT /* Description of any exemptions */,
  "filing_requirements" TEXT /* Description of filing requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("withholding_tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withholding_taxes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rules" (
  "tax_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for tax rule records */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "cfc_rules" TEXT /* Controlled Foreign Corporation rules (yes/no) */,
  "thin_capitalization_rules" TEXT /* Thin capitalization rules (yes/no) */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of tax rule (e.g., CFC, thin capitalization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the rule */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rules_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_treaties" (
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tax treaty */,
  "country_id_1" INTEGER /* First country in the treaty */,
  "country_id_2" INTEGER /* Second country in the treaty */,
  "treaty_description" TEXT /* Description of the treaty */,
  "treaty_type" TEXT /* Type of tax treaty (e.g., double taxation, investment protection) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the treaty */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the treaty */,
  "ratification_status" TEXT /* Status of treaty ratification (e.g., ratified, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_treaties_country_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("country_id_1") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_treaties_country_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("country_id_2") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
